body.text: I'm always on the lookout for ways to upgrade my daily routine, and good sound quality is essential when I'm working on my computer. Wired.com recently put over 25 pairs of computer speakers to the test, and I'm excited to share some of the top picks with you. It's amazing how often we settle for subpar sound, but with these speakers, you can easily elevate your computer experience.

The Best Overall speaker is the Audioengine A2+, priced at $279 on Amazon. For those with limited desk space, the Kanto UKI is a great option, currently on sale for $226 at Walmart. If you're an audiophile, you might want to consider the IK Multimedia iLoud Micro Monitor, which is a more pricey option at $350, but currently discounted to $200. What's interesting is that these speakers aren't just for music enthusiasts – they can also be a great investment for anyone who spends a lot of time on conference calls or watching videos.

8 Best Computer Speakers (2026) After Testing 25+ Pairs is also worth a quick mention. My quick read is that today's set of stories is useful because it gives us texture, not a sermon. Each item has its own little job: one tells us what changed, another tells us what people are worried about, and another gives the day its mood.
